description: As a remote sensing technician setting up an operational monitoring pipeline for a national land survey agency, create a SNAP Graph Processing Tool (GPT) XML graph to process Sentinel-2 spectral bands (sentinel2_B04_red.tif and sentinel2_B08_nir.tif located in /home/ga/snap_data/). The processing chain must collocate the inputs, compute a vegetation index using BandMaths, and apply a spatial subset. The XML graph must utilize at least five connected operator nodes (Read, Collocate, BandMaths, Subset, and Write). Execute the workflow using /opt/snap/bin/gpt and ensure the XML graph and the final output product are saved to /home/ga/snap_projects/.
